meta.publicDescription: Browse the platform's training courses and enroll in a course that fits your goals.
meta.publicDetailDescription: Review the course details, then complete your registration in a few quick steps.
meta.publicPaymentReturnDescription: We will confirm your enrollment with the backend before showing the final result.
meta.adminDescription: Create and manage public courses, enrollments, and payment follow-up.
meta.adminDetailDescription: Review the course configuration, track enrollments, and update Training content.
meta.adminProgramsDescription: Create and manage Training v2 courses, schedules, and lecture content.
meta.adminProgramDetailDescription: Review the course configuration and manage lectures.
meta.adminProgramLearnersDescription: Review enrollments, update trainee details, and manage completion actions.
meta.adminProgramAttendanceDescription: Choose a lecture and record trainee attendance with a simple admin flow.
meta.patientDescription: View your Training course enrollments and their current status.
meta.patientDetailDescription: Review your enrollment, schedule, attendance, and certificate status.
meta.patientPayDescription: Continue a pending Training course payment securely.

errors.generic: Something went wrong while processing your request.
errors.notFound: The training course could not be found.
errors.loadFailed: We could not load the training content right now.
errors.certificateFileRequired: Please choose a certificate PDF before uploading
errors.certificateInvalidType: Only PDF certificate files are allowed
errors.certificateFileTooLarge: The certificate file is too large. Maximum size is 10 MB.
errors.certificateEnrollmentNotEligible: Certificates can only be uploaded for confirmed enrollments
errors.certificateNotFound: The certificate file was not found

errors.generic: Something went wrong while loading this course.
errors.notFound: The selected course could not be found.
errors.registrationClosed: Registration is currently closed for this course.
errors.capacityReached: This course has reached its target trainee count.
errors.missingPricing: This course is missing pricing information right now.
errors.unsupportedCurrency: This course is not available in the selected currency.
errors.alreadyEnrolled: This trainee is already enrolled in the course.
errors.paymentUnavailable: Payment provider is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

hero.title: Training courses
hero.subtitle: Browse the available training courses and register for the one that fits you.

empty.default: No training courses are published yet.

emptySearch.title: No matching training courses
emptySearch.note: Try a different search term or clear the search to view all courses.

notFound.title: Training course not found
notFound.note: This course may have been archived or the link is no longer available.

schedule.title: Lecture schedule
schedule.subtitle: Review the saved lecture timings before you register.

empty.heading: No lecture schedule yet
empty.note: The course is still being prepared. Check back once the full schedule is ready.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1: Fill in the registration form with the basic contact details.
howItWorks.step2: Complete the payment step if the course is paid.
howItWorks.step3: Use the enrollment reference to follow up with the training team.

form.title: Complete registration
form.subtitle: Keep the form short and simple so registration stays fast.
form.identityNote: If you are signed in, we will reuse your saved account details where available.
form.restricted: Admin accounts cannot enroll as trainees. Please use a patient or practitioner account.
form.closed: Registration is closed for this course.
form.closedNote: This course is not currently accepting new enrollments.
form.noteBody: The platform resolves one final price for your account on the server. You do not need to choose a country here.

validation.required: Please enter your name and phone number first.

form.success: Your registration has been created successfully.

result.title: Registration result
result.preSubmitTitle: Registration will be created after submission
result.preSubmitNote: You will receive a secure payment step after the backend creates your enrollment.

error.heading: We could not verify this payment
error.note: Please return to the course page and try again.

verifying.heading: Checking your payment...
verifying.note: We are confirming the latest backend status before showing the final result.
verifying.polling: The backend is still updating the enrollment status. Please wait a moment.

pending.heading: Your payment is still being reviewed
pending.note: If the payment was just completed, please refresh the page or try again from the course page.

confirmed.heading: Enrollment confirmed
confirmed.note: Your payment has been confirmed by the backend.

failed.heading: Payment could not be confirmed
failed.note: You can try the payment again or return to the course details.

canceled.heading: Payment was canceled
canceled.note: You can return to the course page and continue when you're ready.

expired.heading: The payment lecture expired
expired.note: Please start the payment again to continue your enrollment.

unavailable.heading: Payment link unavailable
unavailable.note: We could not load a valid payment link for this enrollment.

pay.title: Continue your training payment
pay.note: We will confirm the latest backend state before opening the hosted checkout.
pay.hostedCheckoutNote: This opens the secure payment flow provided by the backend.

error.title: Could not load payment details
error.note: We could not reach the payment service right now.

notPayable.title: Payment is not available
notPayable.note: This enrollment is not currently waiting for payment.

summary.title: Payment summary
summary.description: Review the course, amount, and payment state before you continue.

payable.title: Payment is ready
payable.note: Your registration is still waiting. Continue to secure checkout to complete payment.

confirmed.title: Payment already confirmed
confirmed.note: This enrollment is already confirmed in the backend. You can return to the enrollment details.

pending.title: Payment is still pending
pending.note: The backend is still reviewing the latest payment status. Refresh or try again if needed.

failed.title: Payment failed
failed.note: The last payment attempt did not complete. You can try again from the secure checkout.

expired.title: Payment lecture expired
expired.note: The payment link is no longer valid. Refresh the page to get a new checkout link.

cancelled.title: Payment was cancelled
cancelled.note: You can return to the enrollment and continue when you are ready.

unavailable.title: Payment is unavailable
unavailable.note: This enrollment cannot continue to checkout right now.
